name: X-Golf Cary
address: 107 Edinburgh S Dr Suite 101A, Cary, NC 27511
about: X-Golf Cary provides a high-tech indoor golf experience using 7 state-of-the-art simulators for play, training, and entertainment. The venue caters to a wide range of golfers, from beginners to serious players, offering a realistic golf environment with a full bar and food menu. Pricing is per simulator, per hour, with special rates for different times of the week and dedicated membership options for frequent visitors.
why_golfers_like_it: World's most accurate golf simulator technology with camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors
PGA-certified professional instruction available for skill development
Full bar and food menu available for a complete entertainment experience
Flexible booking system for individuals, groups, and private events
Multiple membership tiers offering discounts on bay time and menu items

food_and_drink.notes: Full food menu available with tasty bites and options for all ages

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art simulator setup with camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, club rentals are available. You are also welcome to use your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are allowed. X-Golf has a full bar and food menu available on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It generally takes about one hour for an individual player to complete 18 holes. For each additional person, it may take an extra hour to play 18 holes each.

faq.question: Is X-Golf Cary kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue welcomes children of all ages and is suitable for families.
